Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Continued To Dec-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made.

The Court issued an Order To Show Cause to the Attorney and the Administrator for failure to respond to the Court Examiner's notes. The return date is December 11, 2007.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
